tools.name: crawl_website
tools.description:
Crawl a website and extract its content as structured data.

Args:
    url: Website URL to crawl (e.g. 'https://example.com')
    max_pages: Max pages to crawl (default 5)

tools.name: google_search
tools.description:
Search Google and return organic results with titles, URLs, snippets.

Args:
    query: Search query (e.g. 'best python libraries 2026')
    max_results: Max results (default 10)

tools.name: wikipedia_lookup
tools.description:
Look up a Wikipedia article and return its content.

Args:
    topic: Topic to look up (e.g. 'Artificial intelligence')
